series_metadata.series_description: The Electronic Fund Transfer (EFT) and Electronic Benefit Transfer (EBT) Authorization Forms are used for benefit recipients and vendors that are paid from the State Insurance Fund (SIF). These forms give BWC authorization to send a benefit recipient’s / vendors payments electronically to the financial institution indicated. The EFT and EBT forms are scanned into the Warrant UDS System

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years after the date the EFT and EBT Authorization Forms has been scanned then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 30 days after being scanned for quality assurance then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
